mapper.select: SELECT f.follower_user_id, f.followee_user_id, u.external_user_no AS followee_username, u.gender AS followee_gender, u.birth_year AS followee_birth_year, f.created_at AS follow_time FROM user_follow_relations f JOIN users u ON u.user_id = f.followee_user_id WHERE f.follower_user_id = #{followerUserId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC, f.followee_user_id ASC

SELECT f.follower_user_id, f.followee_user_id, u.external_user_no AS followee_username, f.created_at FROM user_follow_relations f JOIN users u ON u.user_id = f.followee_user_id WHERE f.follower_user_id = #{followerUserId} AND u.user_status = 1 ORDER BY f.followee_user_id ASC

SELECT f.follower_user_id, f.followee_user_id, u.external_user_no AS followee_username, f.created_at FROM user_follow_relations f JOIN users u ON u.user_id = f.followee_user_id WHERE u.user_status = 1 ORDER BY f.follower_user_id ASC, f.followee_user_id ASC
